scripts.start: bun run tailwind:build && bun run src/bun/isolated-server.ts
scripts.start:tls: bun run tailwind:build && JOLT_ALLOWED_WS_ORIGINS="${JOLT_ALLOWED_WS_ORIGINS:-}${JOLT_PUBLIC_ORIGIN:+ ${JOLT_PUBLIC_ORIGIN}}" bun run src/bun/isolated-server.ts --tls
scripts.start:monolith: bun run tailwind:build && bun run src/bun/index.ts
scripts.dev: bun run tailwind:build && (bun run tailwind:watch & bun src/bun/index.ts)
scripts.validate: bunx biome check biome.json bun-plugin-react-compiler.ts src/bun src/mainview package.json tsconfig.json && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.build:dev: bun install && bun run tailwind:build && bun run src/bun/build-mainview.ts
scripts.format: bunx biome format biome.json bun-plugin-react-compiler.ts src/bun src/mainview package.json tsconfig.json --write
